name: Manage Users (Admin)
description: Demonstrates the sequence for an Admin to view all users and update their status.

sequence.action: Admin navigates to user management view, triggering a request for all users.
Retrieves all user records from the database.
Returns the list of users to the frontend.
Admin clicks a button to change a user's status.
Updates the status for the given user in the database.
sequence.payload: UPDATE users SET status = ... WHERE id = ...

sequence_diagram_mermaid:
```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor Admin
    participant Browser as PCOMP-001 (Boundary)
    participant AppServer as PCOMP-002 (Controller)
    participant Database as PCOMP-003 (Entity)

    Admin->>+Browser: Navigates to User Management
    Browser->>+AppServer: GET /admin/users (invokes LI-004)
    AppServer->>+Database: SELECT * FROM users
    Database-->>-AppServer: returns [user_list]
    AppServer-->>-Browser: returns [user_list]
    Browser-->>Admin: Displays list of users

    Admin->>+Browser: Changes a user's status
    Browser->>+AppServer: PUT /admin/users/{id}/status (invokes LI-005)
    AppServer->>+Database: UPDATE users SET status=...
    Database-->>-AppServer: {success: true}
    AppServer-->>-Browser: returns {success: true}
    Browser-->>Admin: Refreshes list with new status
```
